name: Tangy Shrimp Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 1/4 ounces) tiny shrimp, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles as directed on package; drain.
2. Mix zucchini, celery, olives, shrimp, and dressing in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Add salad greens and toss gently to combine.
4. Refrigerate at least 2 hours but no longer than 24 hours before serving.
5. Serve chilled over individual salad greens.
4 servings.
